content: Unresolved design questions: (1) One message per file vs one session per file — per-message is more atomic, per-session provides full conversation context. (2) Should done/ be kept indefinitely or cleaned up by age? (3) Is the processor an internal component or an external system?

provenance.raw_agent: One message per file, or one conversation/session per file? Should done/ be kept indefinitely, or cleaned up after some time? Is the processor reading these files something you're building, or is it an external system?
provenance.raw_user: I think pending and done might be best
